query:
SELECT r.id, r.status, r.unit_id, r.author_user_id, r.signedAt, r.signedBy,
  u.role as author_role, u2.role as signer_role
FROM reports r
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.author_user_id
LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = r.signedBy
WHERE r.id = 870001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Me9dVE4fH3ZyTq.ed3df32c863d --database cTdrattvNQ95XCgX9zeyNM --execute SELECT r.id, r.status, r.unit_id, r.author_user_id, r.signedAt, r.signedBy,
  u.role as author_role, u2.role as signer_role
FROM reports r
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.author_user_id
LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = r.signedBy
WHERE r.id = 870001;
